mapper.update: INSERT INTO material_base_price (material_code, material_name, recent_3m_total_quantity, recent_3m_total_amount, avg_unit_price, stats_updated_at) SELECT material_code, MAX(material_name) as material_name, SUM(quantity) as recent_3m_total_quantity, SUM(quantity * unit_price) as recent_3m_total_amount, AVG(unit_price) as avg_unit_price, NOW() as stats_updated_at FROM sales_order_item WHERE order_id IN ( SELECT id FROM sales_order WHERE order_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) AND status IN ('completed', 'shipped') ) GROUP BY material_code ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE material_name = VALUES(material_name), recent_3m_total_quantity = VALUES(recent_3m_total_quantity), recent_3m_total_amount = VALUES(recent_3m_total_amount), avg_unit_price = VALUES(avg_unit_price), stats_updated_at = VALUES(stats_updated_at);
